4-1.q: What is the plural form of the word 'child'?
Which of the following words is a verb?
The cat is sleeping ____ the table because it is warm there.
Choose the word with the correct spelling:
I would like to eat ____ apple for breakfast.
What is the opposite (antonym) of the word 'Fast'?
Which of these is a proper noun?
They ____ playing football at the field right now.
____ is your birthday? I want to buy you a gift.
My father ____ to work by car every morning.

4-2.q: What is the plural form of the word 'box'?
Which of these words is an adjective?
She ____ a new book that she bought yesterday.
We ____ to school together yesterday morning.
I am much taller ____ my younger brother.
What is the collective noun for a group of 'birds'?
The sun ____ in the east every day.
____ are you crying? Did you lose your toy?
Excuse me, can you please help ____ with this bag?

4-3.q: What is the past tense of the word 'eat'?
Which of the following words is an adverb?
What do you call a person who treats sick people?
Choose the correct spelling for this word:
My older sister is ____ engineer at a big company.
____ is the tallest building in our city?
The flowers in the garden ____ very pretty.
Please sit ____ the chair and listen to me.
He ____ like to eat durians because of the smell.

5-1.q: My brother ____ football with his friends every evening.
What is the synonym for the word 'Large'?
We ____ to the cinema to watch a movie last night.
What is the collective noun for a group of lions?
This book belongs to Sarah. It is ____ book.
She is the ____ girl in our entire class.
Please listen ____ to the instructions given by the teacher.
I am very hungry ____ I will eat a large sandwich.
Which of these words is an adjective?
Neither Sarah nor her brothers ____ going to the party.

5-2.q: What is the past tense of the verb 'buy'?
What is the collective noun for a group of 'fish'?
That blue car parked outside is ____.
My mother is much ____ than her younger sister.
You must walk ____ when crossing the busy road.
You should study hard ____ you might fail the exam.
Which of the following is a conjunction?
The news about the accident ____ very surprising.

5-3.q: What is the synonym of the word 'Beautiful'?
Where ____ you and your family yesterday afternoon?
Choose the correct spelling for this word:
I found a ____ of keys on the floor.
Which of these is an abstract noun?
It ____ raining heavily since early this morning.
He is the boy ____ found my lost wallet.
Please look ____ the window and see the rainbow.
I am sorry, but I haven't got ____ money left.

6-1.q: Choose the correct idiom that means 'very easy':
If I ____ you, I would study much harder for the finals.
Which word means 'a person who travels to space'?
The long movie was so ____ that I fell asleep.
He is the person ____ won the gold medal yesterday.
I have been living in this town ____ five years.
She is ____ honest woman who always tells the truth.
What is the past participle of the verb 'write'?
You don't like drinking coffee, ____ you?

6-2.q: What is the passive voice of: 'He eats an apple'?
a: An apple was eaten by him.
An apple is eaten by him.
He is eaten by an apple.

6-2.q: Which word is a synonym for 'Generous'?
I would have gone if I ____ enough time.
Choose the word with the correct spelling:
What does the idiom 'Break a leg' mean?
Which of the following is a compound word?
The thief was eventually caught ____ the police.
He is clearly the ____ player on the whole team.
Although he was tired, ____ he kept on working.
What prefix can be added to 'happy' to mean the opposite?

6-3.q: What is the reported speech for: 'I am tired,' he said.
What is the synonym for the word 'Fragile'?
Neither of the boys ____ here at the moment.
Choose the correct spelling for this word:
What do you call a person who writes books?
What does the idiom 'Once in a blue moon' mean?

I will see you ____ Monday afternoon.
